title: Vivid Vanilla
description: What Minecraft would have looked like if it had never been sold
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19b38779f8c06dd95cc396b9f4c9a977d78f644d_0.webp)

**Trust me, this will be the greatest Minecraft experience you've had in a while**

This modpack finally turns Minecraft into not just that trailer look, but also into the style that you'd expect future Minecraft to be.

Playing this modpack is like playing Minecraft again for the first time.

**It includes**
 - Graphics Enhancements (Resource Packs, Animations, Particles, Shaders etc.)
 - Better Terrain Generation (Terralith)
 - Icons for Buttons
 - A way better UI experience (Mandala's GUI)

And **SO** much more!
